samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="flag">Flag signal for internal state management.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]">Register to store the first valid input data.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="flag">Flag signal to manage the state of the width conversion process.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <condition><negation><and><id>rst_n</id><id>valid_in</id></and></negation></condition>
                <then>
                    <assign><id>data_out</id> = 16'd0;</assign>
                </then>
            </if>
            <else>
                <if>
                    <condition><and><id>valid_in</id><id>flag</id></and></condition>
                    <then>
                        <assign><id>data_out</id> = {<id>data_lock</id>, <id>data_in</id>>;</assign>
                        <assign><id>flag</id> = 0;</assign>
                    </then>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <if>
                        <condition><id>valid_in</id></condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign><id>data_lock</id> = <id>data_in</id>;</assign>
                            <assign><id>flag</id> = 1;</assign>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </else>
            </else>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
